commit_scope: Extend the Form-native text summary source lane with production front-door telemetry receipts and producer pacing receipts against live backpressure.

local_validation.notes: Focused Form proof returns 65535 on Go/Rust/TypeScript with file/store/socket route/production-front-door telemetry/stream producer-pacing rows. This is explicitly 3-kernel only: the fourth-arm gap remains host I/O/socket/channel natives and live external HTTP capture in fkwu. Real-source proof remains 8191 after updating the exact citation offset moved by documentation edits.

residual_route_pressure.next: Keep the healthy runtime-summary route as this telemetry carrier and debug native ideas persistence separately.

ci_validation.notes: CI not run yet in this evidence record.

deploy_validation.summary: Production route probe performed against the existing public front door; code changes are not deployed until this branch is merged and production deploy catches up.

phase_gate.gate: Source receipts carry production front-door telemetry rows and producer pacing against channel backpressure as native Form data.
phase_gate.next: Lower the production HTTP probe into all-kernel-native external HTTP capture and extend producer pacing into adaptive rate control with measured queue depth, ack latency, and replay lag.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No public API behavior is changed by this stdlib/doc slice. Form source receipts now expose production-front-door telemetry and producer pacing rows for summarizer learning.
test_flows: The focused multi-source Form band proves the route lane through socket_listen/socket_connect/socket_send/kh-serve-listener/socket_recv plus a production front-door telemetry sample row.

The stream lane writes a .fkb channel, reads two payloads before ack, records one deferred payload, advances ack cursor 3, appends the deferred payload after ack, and reads it back from the replay cursor.
The public runtime summary endpoint returned native-kernel headers and matching body byte count.
e2e_validation.summary: Local Form proof passed and public front-door telemetry probe returned native-kernel route evidence.
